items.name: Cute Bear Costume Suit Brown
items.description:
A cute bear costume that covers your whole body.
The fluffy fabric is very comfortable to the touch!
The tail and paws are also very lovely!

For the cutest look, we recommend wearing the following parts with this item.

・Head
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/10638267973/Stevie-Standard-Head

・Arm,Leg,Torso
https://www.roblox.com/bundles/994/Base-Body-Jordan
*Please remove hair, tank top, and shorts.

Other Special Items are Available.
You can find more in our place!
https://www.roblox.com/games/117927146209905/

Watch The Group "Landho" For early announcements.
https://www.roblox.com/groups/33795837/Landho#!/store
